Title: Check White Labeling widget
Steps:
1. Navigate to Admin Dashboard
2. Locate White Labeling widget
Expected Result: White Labeling widget displayed with current settings summary

Title: Set theme presets
Steps:
1. Navigate to White Labeling settings
2. Select a theme preset
3. Save
Expected Result: Theme preset applied; colors change accordingly

Title: Upload custom logo - allowed extensions
Steps:
1. Navigate to White Labeling
2. Upload logo with allowed file extension (PNG/SVG/JPG)
3. Save

Title: Upload logo - rejected for invalid extension
Steps: 1. Attempt to upload logo with non-allowed extension

Title: Upload favicon
Steps:
1. Navigate to White Labeling
2. Upload favicon
3. Save
Expected Result: Favicon uploaded and displayed in browser tab

Title: Per-organization footer links - add parent links
Steps:
1. Navigate to Organization settings
2. Add parent footer links for Organization1
3. Save
Expected Result: Parent footer links created for organization

Title: Per-organization footer links - add children links
Steps:
1. Add children footer links under parent
2. Save
Expected Result: Child footer links nested under parent

Title: Footer links returned in GraphQL query
Steps:
1. Query footer links via GraphQL
2. Verify response
Expected Result: GraphQL query returns correct footer link hierarchy

Title: Organization-specific logo and favicon
Steps:
1. Set custom logo/favicon for Organization1
2. Sign in under Organization1 account
3. Verify branding displayed
Expected Result: Organization-specific logo and favicon displayed for org users

Title: White Labeling Enabled = OFF shows default branding
Steps:
1. Set White Labeling Enabled = OFF
2. Navigate to storefront
3. Verify branding
Expected Result: Default platform branding displayed when WL disabled

Title: White Labeling Enabled = ON shows custom branding
Steps:
1. Set White Labeling Enabled = ON
2. Navigate to storefront
3. Verify branding
Expected Result: Custom logo/favicon/colors displayed when WL enabled

Title: Store-level White Labeling OFF
Steps:
1. Set store-level White Labeling = OFF
2. Verify storefront
Expected Result: Store-level WL override disables custom branding for that store

Title: Enable thumbnail job for favicons
Steps:
1. Enable thumbnail job
2. Add new run for favicon generation
3. Verify favicons generated
Expected Result: Favicon generation job runs and produces favicons in all required sizes
